assessment.note: He has a workable technical map but still lacks the historical context behind tradeoffs, which is a mild remaining clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Historical tradeoffs
new_queue.name: Which tradeoffs feel hardest to place without the backstory?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific missing historical context he named so the manager can target the gap.

new_queue.label: Ownership edges
new_queue.name: Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy?
new_queue.description: Finds the places where he could accidentally overstep or hold back because the boundary is not concrete yet.

new_queue.label: Context moments
new_queue.name: When do you find yourself needing more context before you move?
new_queue.description: Identifies the decision points where he should slow down and ask instead of filling gaps himself.

new_queue.label: Architecture assumptions
new_queue.name: What kinds of architecture calls feel easiest to misread here?
new_queue.description: Surfaces where his internal model may diverge from team norms or established patterns.

new_queue.label: Useful introductions
new_queue.name: Who would be most useful for you to spend live time with next?
new_queue.description: Helps line up the next relationship that will improve his map of how the team actually works.

new_queue.label: Steady next steps
new_queue.name: What should we line up before our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes the meeting by turning the discussion into concrete follow-up and support.
